Read More Our Services At Kamla Devi IVF Center, we understand the emotional and physical challenges of infertility. Our team of experienced doctors, embryologists, and support staff is committed to delivering personalized care and innovative solutions tailored to each patient's needs. In Vitro Fertilization (IVF) IVF is a powerful tool in modern reproductive medicine, offering hope to couples struggling with infertility. Contact Us Intrauterine Insemination (IUI) Intrauterine Insemination (IUI) is widely used fertility treatment help couples overcome certain types of infertility challenges. Contact Us Egg Donation and Surrogacy Egg donation and surrogacy are valuable options for individuals and couples struggling with infertility. Contact Us Fertility Preservation Fertility preservation provides hope for individuals facing medical treatments that may impact their ability to conceive naturally. Contact Us About Our Center Advanced Fertility Treatments The Kamla Devi IVF Center is dedicated to providing advanced fertility treatments with compassion and expertise. Founded on the principles of patient care and clinical excellence, our center offers a comprehensive range of services aimed at helping couples achieve their dream of parenthood. In Vitro Fertilization (IVF) Intrauterine Insemination (IUI) Egg Donation and Surrogacy Fertility Preservation Diagnostic Services More Information 1500 + Total Cases 32 + Year Of Experience 1500 + Happy Patient 500 + Surgeies Our Services We Provide Best Services Services offered at Kamla Devi IVF Center include: In Vitro Fertilization (IVF) A advance technique for fertilizing eggs with sperm outside the body, offering hope to couples facing complex infertility issues. Intrauterine Insemination (IUI) It offers a less invasive alternative to IVF and can be an effective option depending on individual circumstances. Involves placing sperm inside a woman's uterus. Egg Donation and Surrogacy Egg donation and surrogacy are two methods used in reproduction for individuals or couples who face challenges conceiving pregnancy. Fertility Preservation Techniques to preserve fertility for individuals facing medical treatments that may impact their reproductive capabilities.Eggs are retrieved from the ovaries, frozen, and stored for future use. More Services Some Important FAQ's Common Frequently Asked Questions Q: What is IVF? A: IVF stands for In Vitro Fertilization. It's a type of assisted reproductive technology (ART) where fertilization occurs outside the body, typically in a laboratory setting. Q: What is IVF procedure? A: Ovarian Stimulation Egg Retrieval Fertilization Embryo Culture Embryo Transfer Luteal Phase Support Pregnancy Test Q: Is it safe? A: In general, IVF (In Vitro Fertilization) is considered safe, but like any medical procedure, it carries some risks and considerations.
